title: SRNL Addresses Complex Category of Legacy Nuclear Material
description: The Department of Energy keeps a detailed inventory of legacy nuclear materials housed across the DOE complex, including disposition pathways for the materials. A recurring issue, though, is that there are materials categorized as having a to be determined disposition plan. The National Nuclear Security Administration’s Nuclear Materials Integration Division chartered Savannah River National Laboratory to...
text: Savannah River National Laboratory is a multi-program Federally Funded Research and Development Center managed and operated by Battelle Savannah River Alliance, LLC, for the U.S. Department of Energy’s Office of Environmental Management. SRNL is an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. SRNL is also committed to making our workplace accessible to individuals with disabilities and will provide reasonable accommodations, upon request, for individuals to participate in the application and hiring process. To request such an accommodation, you may contact us by e-mail at srnlrecruiting@srnl.doe.gov.
